title: Molten Show-Off Brazilian Kiwifruit Paella
description: A showy, sweet, and savory Brazilian dish featuring kiwifruit, yuzu-cure, and halal-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chorizo and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the aji amarillo peppers and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes.
Stir in the yuzu-cured kiwifruit and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 450°F (230°C) for 10 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the rice is tender.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for 2 minutes.
Fluff the paella with a fork and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Drizzle with yuzu juice and serve immediately.
